headline: What J. M. Smucker (SJM)'s Upgraded 2026 Outlook Amid Rising Input Costs Means For Shareholders
summary: The J. M. Smucker Company recently raised its fiscal 2026 outlook on the back of stronger free cash flow and expanding e-commerce and direct-to-customer channels, while sector analysts have highlighted rising input costs that could pressure earnings in fiscal 2027. At the same time, J. M. Smucker’s participation at the Gartner Finance Symposium and differing analyst views on earnings trends underscore a tension between near-term operational strength and longer-term cost and margin concerns...
